text: All comparables have been found on the eastside of Bloomington, IL and were selected to demonstrate the marketability of houses of a similar location, design, age, quality, and condition that have been recently updated. Due to recent market trends the comparables have received a market time adjustment of 7.1% based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. The comparables have been adjusted to account for the subject's location on a busy road, however, Comparable #4 has been included to demonstrate the marketability of recently updated houses on Empire St. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its location, site size, basement, and garage. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its location, site size, garage, enclosed porch, and fence. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its location, site size, age, bathroom count, GLA, basement, enclosed porch, and fence.
